title: Code-knowledge index: background-refresh rebuild trigger
context: Issue #353 says the background refresh should full-rebuild 'when head_commit branch changes' and otherwise incrementally re-parse only changed files. Verification found the existing RAG index does NOT rebuild on branch change: branch switches are absorbed by incremental content-hash diff, and only a chunker/schema-version mismatch forces a full rebuild. Following the issue literally is net-new logic that diverges from the established index-refresh precedent. AC-5 (only-changed-files re-parse) is satisfied either way.

options.label: Match the RAG precedent: content-hash diff absorbs branch switches; full rebuild only on schema_version mismatch (consistent, avoids redundant full rebuilds)
Follow the issue literally: compare stored meta.head_commit/branch and full-rebuild on change

rationale: Follow the issue literally: compare stored meta.head_commit/branch and full-rebuild on change; incremental re-parse otherwise.
